news.headline: Russia–Ukraine Easter truce expires amid mutual accusations of violations
news.summary: A 32-hour Easter truce between Russia and Ukraine expired on Monday, with both sides accusing each other of thousands of violations despite a brief lull in air and missile strikes along the 1,200-kilometre front line. The ceasefire period still saw ongoing drone and artillery activity, officials sai

news.headline: Iran war live: US military says it will block Iranian traffic in Hormuz
news.summary: CENTCOM says the blockade will begin at 14:00 GMT, as Iran warns of even higher prices at the pump.

news.headline: Political turmoil in Indian border state as nine million lose voting rights
news.summary: Nine million voters have been dropped from rolls in West Bengal, raising concerns over exclusion and fairness.

news.headline: In Pakistan Talks, Iran Saw a U.S. Trying to Dictate, Not Negotiate
news.summary: Iran sees American demands as reaching far beyond what the United States achieved in war. Tehran is gambling that it can withstand further bombardment more than Washington is willing to sustain economic chaos, experts say.
